title: QIK-VRT: EFFECT_ACK - universalisierbare Wirkungssteuerung und adaptive fail-closed Laufzeit
description: Versioned QIK-VRT software with a strict ANSI-C90 EFFECT_ACK core, exhaustive finite-model evidence, reproducible Draft-01 validation with xml2rfc 3.34.0, checksum-bound GitHub CLI and renderer environments, and a bounded collective-adaptive proposal process. The process is universalizable for finite fully and lawfully accessible digital artifacts, but it is not a universal decoder, does not recover lost information, and does not remove the Halting Problem or Rice undecidability.
notes: Reserved software DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.21498774. The record continues credential-owned QIK-VRT concept 10.5281/zenodo.21488115 and retains QIKVRT V8.33 record 10.5281/zenodo.20712301 as a historical reference. The deterministic tag-tree export is mixed licensed; file-level PolyForm Noncommercial, CC BY-NC-ND, historical Apache-2.0, IETF Trust, and third-party notices remain controlling. No GitHub Release object and no IETF Datatracker submission are created.
